description_long: This bungalow features a long, rectangular footprint with a low-pitched, dark gable roof covered in a grid-patterned material. The exterior walls are clad in wood paneling, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The front facade is lined with large, evenly spaced windows and a central double-door entry, allowing ample natural light inside. The rear side has fewer windows and several single doors, suggesting access to individual rooms or units. Both shorter sides of the building have two small, square windows, maintaining a simple and balanced look. The structure sits on a light gray concrete foundation that extends outward to form small entry platforms.
description: A long, wood-paneled bungalow with a dark gable roof, large front windows, and a concrete foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows and a central double-door entry along the wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gable end with two small square windows and the sloped roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows and several single doors, indicating possible separate rooms or units.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other gable end with two small square windows.
